title: Dark Gradient Hero — SVG Bolt + Glow Animation Spec
body:
# Dark Gradient Hero — SVG Bolt + Glow Animation Spec ## Hero Background Gradient The hero goes dark navy-to-purple (distinct from the pure navy of other dark sections): ```css .hero { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 40%, #2d1b69 80%, #1a0938 100%); /* The purple endpoint (#2d1b69) echoes the bolt brand color without screaming */ } ``` This creates visual distinction between the hero (navy-purple) and the comparison section (pure navy `#16213e`), preventing them from looking identical. ## SVG Lightning Bolt Replace `⚡️` emoji with inlined SVG. Path extracted from `/public/favicon.svg`: ```tsx // In HomePage.tsx hero section ``` ## Glow Animation CSS `@keyframes` pulsing drop-shadow — no JS needed: ```css .bolt-svg { animation: bolt-glow 3s ease-in-out infinite; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(134, 59, 255, 0.6)); } @keyframes bolt-glow { 0% { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(134, 59, 255, 0.55)); } 50% { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 24px rgba(134, 59, 255, 0.95)) drop-shadow(0 0 48px rgba(134, 59, 255, 0.35)); } 100% { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(134, 59, 255, 0.55)); } } /* Respect reduced-motion preference */ @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .bolt-svg { animation: none; } } ``` Animation notes: - Duration: 3s (slow, breathing — not aggressive flash) - Easing: `ease-in-out` (smooth pulse, not mechanical) - Double drop-shadow at peak: inner bright + outer diffuse, creates depth - `rgba(134, 59, 255, ...)` = `#863bff` with opacity — matches exact brand color ## Hero Content Hierarchy (on dark gradient) ``` [bolt icon 56px, glow animation] [h1: hero-headline — Outfit 800, 56px, #f3f4f6] [p: hero-subtitle — system, 400, 20px, rgba(255,255,255,0.72)] [CTA buttons row] [Primary: amber fill btn-start] [Secondary: white text, transparent, underline on hover] ``` ## Placement in Hero JSX ```tsx

{...}

{...}

...
``` ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Hero uses `linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 40%, #2d1b69 80%, #1a0938 100%)` - [ ] SVG bolt replaces emoji, uses exact path from favicon.svg - [ ] Glow animation runs at 3s cycle, pauses with `prefers-reduced-motion` - [ ] Animation uses CSS only (no JS, no GSAP for this element) - [ ] All hero text passes WCAG AA contrast on the dark gradient
